task.title: Notification Submission API
task.description: Implement POST endpoints for single and batch notification submission

implementation.details:
1. Create POST /api/v1/notifications endpoint
2. Add request validation with serde
3. Implement batch submission endpoint
4. Add authentication middleware
5. Return proper HTTP status codes and error responses

task.acceptance_criteria: Can submit valid notifications and receive 202 Accepted, invalid requests return 400 with error details, rate limits enforced
